name: Smart Save
description: Saves structured content (recipes, project ideas, tool notes, household info, etc.) to the knowledge base as a properly formatted markdown file. Use this when the user shares something worth keeping that is more than a one-line fact — full recipes, project plans, tool specs, how-to guides, or any structured knowledge. The AI should determine the category, title, and format the content as markdown before calling this skill.
author: Michael

category.description: The category for routing. One of: recipe, project, tool, household, finance, general

title.description: A short descriptive title for the content (e.g., 'Michaels Chili', 'Dovetail Jig Build', 'Miter Saw Specs')

content.description: The full content to save, formatted as markdown. Include headings, lists, ingredients, steps, specs — whatever is appropriate for the type of content.
